name: XMonitor - Order Status Polling Staging
description: Staging workflow that polls saved SMM order statuses every 30 minutes, updates Supabase order/post state, and sends final Telegram notifications once.

parameters.query:
SELECT *
FROM public."Order Info"
WHERE normalized_status IN ('pending', 'in_progress')
  AND next_check_at <= now()
ORDER BY next_check_at ASC
LIMIT 50;

UPDATE public."Order Info"
SET
  provider_status = $2,
  normalized_status = $3,
  status_response = $4::jsonb,
  charge = $5::numeric,
  start_count = $6::integer,
  remains = $7::integer,
  currency = $8,
  poll_attempts = poll_attempts + 1,
  last_checked_at = now(),
  next_check_at = CASE
    WHEN $3 IN ('completed', 'partial', 'canceled', 'failed') THEN next_check_at
    ELSE now() + interval '30 minutes'
  END,
  last_error = $9,
  completed_at = CASE
    WHEN $3 IN ('completed', 'partial', 'canceled', 'failed') THEN COALESCE(completed_at, now())
    ELSE completed_at
  END
WHERE id = $1::uuid
RETURNING *;

UPDATE public."Posts"
SET status = $2
WHERE post_id = $1
RETURNING post_id, status;

conditions.leftValue: ={{ ['completed', 'partial', 'canceled', 'failed'].includes($('Update Order Info Status').item.json.normalized_status) && !$('Update Order Info Status').item.json.notified_at }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE public."Order Info"
SET notified_at = now()
WHERE id = $1::uuid
  AND notified_at IS NULL
RETURNING id, notified_at;
